testcase.name: runScenario["Verify login page title", "Login Test"](1)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify login page title &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/login.feature:3&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[33mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[33muser opens the browser&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36muser navigates to "https://example.com"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[36mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[36mpage title should contain "Example"&amp#27;[0m

By default Cucumber scans the entire classpath for step definitions. You can restrict this by configuring the glue path.
